clauses_raw.clause_text_raw: Uses permitted in the R-1N Zone subject to the Regulations for Permitted Uses for the R-1N Zone;
Uses permitted in the R-2 Zone subject to the Regulations for the Permitted Uses for the R-2 Zone;
Apartment Dwelling;
Block Townhouse Dwelling;
Converted Dwelling;
Lodging House Limited;
Stacked Townhouse Dwelling;
Townhouse Dwelling;
The following Institutional uses, subject to the Regulations for Permitted Uses for the Institutional (I) Zone
Community Building;
Community Care Facility;
Community Institutional;
Commercial Daycare Centre; and
Nursing Home

cells_raw.cell_text_raw: 115 sq. m (1,237.9 sq ft) per unit
140 sq. m (1,507.0 sq ft) per unit

sections_raw.section_title_raw: REGULATIONS FOR TOWNHOUSE, STACKED AND BLOCK TOWNHOUSE DWELLINGS

clauses_raw.clause_text_raw: Regulations for Townhouses, Stacked and Block Townhouse Dwellings include:
Where Dwelling Units are to be subdivided, an Easement in favour of the central units for access to the Rear Yards from the Street shall be provided.
A maximum of 8 consecutive Dwelling Units
Where 8 consecutive Dwelling Units are proposed, individual Dwelling Units shall not exceed 6.5 m (21.3 ft) in width.

cells_raw.cell_text_raw: Lot Frontage Per Unit and Per Stack (2) Units for Stacked Townhouses (Minimum)
6.1 m (20.0 ft) OR 25.0 m (82 ft) whichever is less
9.0 m (29.5 ft) OR 30.0 m (98.4 ft) whichever is less

sections_raw.section_title_raw: REGULATIONS FOR LODGING HOUSES AND GROUP HOMES

clauses_raw.clause_text_raw: The number of rooms is determined by the following:
For the first 325 sq. m (3,498.3 sq. ft.) for an interior lot and 395 sq. m (4,251.7 sq. ft.) for a corner lot of Lot Area, four (4) bedrooms are permitted;
For every additional bedroom or lodging room over four (4) bedrooms or lodging rooms, the Lot area must be increased by 90 sq. m (968.7 sq. ft.) thereof.

tables_raw.table_title_raw: REGULATIONS FOR LODGING HOUSES AND GROUP HOMES

clauses_raw.clause_text_raw: An existing Dwelling may be Altered and used as a Duplex, Semi-detached or a Multi-unit Dwelling provided that:
The Building is structurally sound and the conversion satisfies the requirements under the City of Charlottetown Building Code By-law.
The conversion can be undertaken without extreme Alterations or Additions excepting the construction or addition of new windows, fire escapes and outside stairways;
The number of Dwelling Units permitted shall be consistent with that which is permitted for an Apartment Dwelling.
Notwithstanding the requirements, the following are permitted as accessory or secondary uses:
Accessory Building;
Home Occupation; and
Home Daycare
